name: editora-monorepo
description: Editora ecosystem monorepo for modern design system UI components and rich text editor packages.

scripts.test:ui:unit: npm run test:ui-core:unit && npm run test:ui-react:unit
scripts.test:ui: npm run test:ui-core && npm run test:ui-react
scripts.check:components: npm run generate:components && git diff --exit-code -- components.json components.schema.json examples/editora-docs/static/components.json examples/editora-docs/static/components.schema.json
scripts.verify:release: npm run build -w @editora/core && npm run build -w @editora/themes && npm run build -w @editora/plugins && npm run build -w @editora/performance && npm run build -w @editora/icons && npm run build -w @editora/ui-core && npm run build -w @editora/ui-react && npm run build -w @editora/react-icons && npm run build -w @editora/toast && npm run build -w @editora/light-code-editor && npm run build -w @editora/react && npm run build -w packages/editora && npm_config_cache=/tmp/.npm-cache-editora npm pack --dry-run --workspace=@editora/core > /dev/null && npm_config_cache=/tmp/.npm-cache-editora npm pack --dry-run --workspace=@editora/themes > /dev/null && npm_config_cache=/tmp/.npm-cache-editora npm pack --dry-run --workspace=@editora/plugins > /dev/null && npm_config_cache=/tmp/.npm-cache-editora npm pack --dry-run --workspace=@editora/performance > /dev/null && npm_config_cache=/tmp/.npm-cache-editora npm pack --dry-run --workspace=@editora/icons > /dev/null && npm_config_cache=/tmp/.npm-cache-editora npm pack --dry-run --workspace=@editora/ui-core > /dev/null && npm_config_cache=/tmp/.npm-cache-editora npm pack --dry-run --workspace=@editora/ui-react > /dev/null && npm_config_cache=/tmp/.npm-cache-editora npm pack --dry-run --workspace=@editora/react-icons > /dev/null && npm_config_cache=/tmp/.npm-cache-editora npm pack --dry-run --workspace=@editora/toast > /dev/null && npm_config_cache=/tmp/.npm-cache-editora npm pack --dry-run --workspace=@editora/light-code-editor > /dev/null && npm_config_cache=/tmp/.npm-cache-editora npm pack --dry-run --workspace=@editora/react > /dev/null && npm_config_cache=/tmp/.npm-cache-editora npm pack --dry-run --workspace=packages/editora > /dev/null
scripts.prerelease: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run test && npm run test:ui
